description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy designed to resemble a stylized bear with a large, round head and small, rounded body. Its fur is primarily a soft off-white color, accented with bright blue on the ears, arms, legs, and around the eyes, as well as a blue patch on the belly and a small blue tail. The face features large, dark, oval eyes set within blue patches, a small brown nose, and a subtle greenish tint on the right eye patch. The toy's limbs are short and stubby, giving it a cute, cartoonish appearance. The surface appears to be made of a soft, matte fabric, likely polyester or a similar plush material, and the toy is likely filled with lightweight stuffing. This stuffed bear would be a common sight in urban parks, playgrounds, or as a lost toy on a city sidewalk.
description: A soft, plush bear toy with off-white fur, blue accents, and large dark eyes, featuring a cute and cartoonish design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bear's face with blue patches around the eyes, a brown nose, and blue ears, arms, and legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the roundness of the head, the protruding blue ear, and the blue arm and leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain off-white back, blue tail, and blue accents on the lower back and legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the blue ear, arm, and leg, as well as the round head and small tail.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression appears neutral to slightly stern, with large, dark, downturned eyes and no visible mouth, giving it a somewhat serious or contemplative look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with arms slightly out to the sides and legs apart, head facing forward.
